creator: thelandymancan@gmail.com
text:
make from ports hangs shortly after entering
/usr/ports/sysutils/polkit-qt/work/polkit-qt-1-0.99.0/agent
statement was (as best as could copy freehand):
/usr/local/bin/automoc4 /usr/ports/sysutils/polkit-qt/work/polkit-qt-1-0.99.0/agent/polkit-qt-agent-1_automoc.cpp /usb/ports/sysutils/polkit-qt/work/polkit-qt-1-0.99.0/agent /usb/ports/sysutils/polkit-qt/work/polkit-qt-1-0.99.0/agent /usr/local/bin/moc-qt4 /usr/local/bin/cmake

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11/kde4
make -DBATCH install clean
(or)
make install clean
